nodes.label: ASTA conversational task manager.  Implements the chat-driven routine task CRUD:
Keyword-first routing of a routine task message. Order matters.
Convert a relative duration ("in 5 minutes", "2 hours") to an absolute     HH:MM
Pull task name / time / priority out of a create request.
Pull target task name + new time out of a reschedule request.
Return tasks scored against query, descending, filtered to >= _MATCH_MIN.
Return (task, None) if a single confident match, (None, candidates) if ambiguous
Parse a Notion 'Date' (YYYY-MM-DD) + 'Scheduled Time' (e.g. '5pm') into an     I
Fire an FCM push to all registered device tokens.      Gracefully skipped when s
APScheduler callback: broadcast a proactive reminder over WS, persist to     Not
Register a one-time APScheduler job to fire this reminder. Returns True if sched
Strip command words from a 'mark X as done' phrase to get the task name.
Route a chat routine message to create / list / complete / reschedule.      May
